steps.title: Find the grammatical structure
steps.content: To the left of the blank ends the participial phrase “assuming solar panel installers' cooperation” (a noun phrase). To the right begins the independent clause “this practice has the potential…”.

steps.title: Apply the punctuation rule
steps.content:
A comma is required after an introductory participial phrase to separate it from the main clause.
Choice D provides that comma.
The other three either create a punctuation error or incorrectly join the phrase and clause.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
